title: aetheorhiza bulbosa subsp. willkommii
intro: Aetheorhiza bulbosa subsp. willkommii, also known as Aetheorhiza bulbosa Willkomm's, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Aetheorhiza bulbosa subsp. willkommii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
